race.description: Welcome Gold Club Members Mdn Hcp
race.comment: NAUGHTY NANNA (7) started a $2.50 favourite on debut last start over 1050m at Toowoomba but after enjoying a nice run could not capitalise and just missed the placings. Likely improver who is in the right race to set the record straight. JUNGLE RHYTHM (1) returns from a 14-week spell. Has only raced once and did a good job to work home into second over 1000m at the Sunshine Coast. Expect that form to stack up favourably. CHARMING SEAHORSE (2) made it two minor placings from as many appearances when he battled on well for third over 1050m here recently. Will go forward from a wide gate and should be competitive again. POWER OF ANGELINE (11) didn't do a great deal first-up here but is capable of better.
